case_title: POWELL INVESTMENTS A CALIF. LIMITED PART. VS. DOUGLAS K VINSON et al

docket_entries.description: EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT VINSON, DOUGLAS K
PROOF OF SERVICE BY MAIL PARTY SERVED-ARNOLD W EVJE; ANSWER FILED BY DEFENDANT VINSON, DOUGLAS K
ANSWER FILED BY DEFENDANT VINSON, DOUGLAS K
MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF POWELL INVESTMENTS A CALIF. LIMITED PART. COURT TRIAL SET FOR MAR-11-2002 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
JUDGE RONALD EVANS QUIDACHAY, CLERK NICOLE OLCOMENDY, REPORTER BELDON YEE. MASTER COURT CALENDAR OF MAR-11-2002 ASSIGNED TO COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON MAR-11-2002 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 611.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VINSON, DOUGLAS K THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 655 POWELL ST., #105 $4,592.09 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,592.09, PER DIEM HOLD-OVER OF $33.91 DAY; COSTS PER COST BILL NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $33.91 PER DAY FILED BY PLAINTIFF POWELL INVESTMENTS A CALIF. LIMITED PART.

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF POWELL INVESTMENTS A CALIF. LIMITED PART. AS TO DEFENDANT VINSON, DOUGLAS K DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

JUDGE DIANE WICK, CLERK-BETH WILBER, REPORTER-BRENDA FIELDS: C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. MR. EVJE PRESENT FOR PLAINTIFFS; CASE PROCEEDS AS A PROVE-UP WITHOUT DEFENDANTS. AFTER HEARING THE COURT GRANTS JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF SUBMITS A JUDGDMENT FORM
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT VINSON, DOUGLAS K
